data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the prerequisite dependency rules.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the prerequisite dependency rules, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to these rules. While the linked use case outlines the need for prerequisite dependency rules, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate their implementation or validation. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of prerequisite dependency rules validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the prerequisite dependency rules.
